programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.title: The James Epperly Show

Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

Have you notebook by your side to take notes, as this is active life coaching session. Join us to explore the power of inspiration.

programme.title: 1 Strengthening Relationships Part 1
programme.desc: This session offers Self-Reflection. We will also address communications skills, both verbal and non-verbal as these are essential for any healthy relationship.

programme.title: 2 Strengthening Relationships Part 2
programme.desc: Budling Trust in your Relationship. Establishing trust and respect is essential for healthy relationships encouraging open communication and collaboration fostering mutual understanding and support.

programme.title: Goal Mapping - 7 Empowering Questions
programme.desc: Goal Mapping - Live Your Best Life Goal Mapping is a simple system for success – yet it is so extremely powerful. It has helped people achieve success relating to wealth, health, career, education, sport, weight-loss and anything else they dream of.

programme.title: P3 Strengthening Relationships
programme.desc: Life Coaching Session helping you with your Relationships. Building Trust, Communications and emotional connection. This session focuses on enhancing relationship for better wellbeing and happiness, guiding you to improve romantic or friendship relationships.

programme.title: P4 Strengthening relationship Part 4
programme.desc: This life coaching session focuses on Relationships, and how to create life long bonds. This session focuses on enhancing relationships for better well-being and happiness.

programme.title: Affirmations for Positive Thinking
programme.desc: Let this program lift up your day. Write down the positive affirmations and repeat them throughout the day. Positive affirmations require regular practice if you want to make lasting, long-term changes to the ways that you think and feel. The good news is that the practice and popularity of positive affirmations are based on widely accepted and well-established psychological theory.
